results.title: Crypto News Today: Retail Crypto Investors Move From Hype to Bitcoin, Large-Cap Assets, and SIP Plans
results.description: Cryptocurrency investing gains structure as experts suggest SIP-style plans, Bitcoin focus, and 2% to 5% portfolio exposure for retail investors.

results.title: Illinois' POWER Act data center regulation won’t move forward this spring
results.description: The POWER Act, an expansive bill to regulate data centers, will not pass the General Assembly this spring, but leaders say it isn’t dead. Negotiations will continue through the summer.
